sentiment.reasoning: Launching a next-generation manufacturing platform suggests long-term productivity gains and competitive advantage.

sentiment.reasoning: Strong demand and a raised outlook are highly positive indicators of financial performance and growth.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
